title: bind9.18 security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[32:9.18.29-5.2]
- Fix upstream reported regression in recent CVE fix (CVE-2025-8677)
- Add upstream created test to this regression

[32:9.18.29-5.1]
- Refuse malformed DNSKEY records (CVE-2025-8677)
- Address various spoofing attacks (CVE-2025-40778)
- Prevent cache poisoning due to weak PRNG (CVE-2025-40780)

[32:9.18.29-5]
- logrotate: skip if empty and remove old variants (RHEL-113942)
full_text:
[32:9.18.29-5.2]
- Fix upstream reported regression in recent CVE fix (CVE-2025-8677)
- Add upstream created test to this regression

[32:9.18.29-5.1]
- Refuse malformed DNSKEY records (CVE-2025-8677)
- Address various spoofing attacks (CVE-2025-40778)
- Prevent cache poisoning due to weak PRNG (CVE-2025-40780)

[32:9.18.29-5]
- logrotate: skip if empty and remove old variants (RHEL-113942)

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-21111.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-40778.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-40780.html
https://linux.oracle.com/cve/CVE-2025-8677.html
